text.title: pnpm Workspaces with Dependency Catalogs Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to introduce pnpm catalogs end-to-end.

step.name: verify-pnpm-version
step.decision-gate: If team rejects pnpm upgrade, STOP — methodology does not apply.

step.name: audit-shared-deps
step.action: List external deps appearing in >=2 packages.

step.name: author-workspace-yaml
step.action: Write `pnpm-workspace.yaml` with `packages:`, `catalog:`, and any named `catalogs:` (e.g., `next:` for canaries).

step.name: rewrite-package-jsons
step.action: Replace shared-dep versions with `"catalog:"`; internal-package refs with `"workspace:*"`. Run `pnpm install`.

step.name: ci-filter-and-validate
step.action: Set CI test command to `pnpm --filter '...[origin/main]' test`. Run `scripts/validate-pnpm-catalogs.py --file pnpm-workspace.json` to confirm shape.
